title: Aderine SMP Modpack
description: Stable multiplayer gameplay with performance, exploration, and fun tools!
body:
Aderine SMP 🌍 is a balanced, server-friendly pack. Explore new worlds, automate your base, and play with friends without lag.

Features:

🛠️ Vanilla-style tech and exploration mods

🌐 Optimized for multiplayer servers

🖼️ Clean visuals and no heavy clutter

🏗️ Building tools for creative players

If you enjoy what I do, consider supporting me on Ko-fi! Every little bit means the world! https://ko-fi.com/pug116
